mapper.sql: metric_date, new_users, active_users, course_views, content_interactions, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted
mapper.select: select count(1) from statistics_daily_metrics where deleted = false
select from statistics_daily_metrics where deleted = false order by metric_date desc limit 1
select from statistics_daily_metrics where deleted = false order by metric_date desc limit #{limit}
select from statistics_daily_metrics where metric_date = #{metricDate} and deleted = false
mapper.update: update statistics_daily_metrics set new_users = #{newUsers}, active_users = #{activeUsers}, course_views = #{courseViews}, content_interactions = #{contentInteractions}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, deleted = #{deleted} where metric_date = #{metricDate}
